title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Cushman & Wakefield India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Cushman & Wakefield India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Cushman & Wakefield India in Gurgaon offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cushman & Wakefield India:
Cushman & Wakefield India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cushman & Wakefield India!
